name: Hamburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute ground beef, onion, and 2/3 of the mushrooms in a skillet until the beef is well browned; drain off excess fat.
2. Add salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and biscuit mix to the meat mixture. Spread evenly in a pastry-lined pan.
3. Beat eggs lightly and add cottage cheese, mixing well.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the meat filling.
5. Garnish with remaining mushrooms.
6. Bake in an oven set to 375°F for 30 minutes. Serve the quiche hot.
